args.code:
import json
from datetime import datetime

# Get the data from previous queries
cases_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:8']
orderitem_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:6']

print("Cases data type:", type(cases_data))
print("OrderItem data type:", type(orderitem_data))

if cases_data and len(cases_data) > 0:
    print("\nFirst case:", cases_data[0])
    print("\nTotal cases found:", len(cases_data))
else:
    print("\nNo cases data found")

print("\nOrderItem count:", len(orderitem_data))

var_functions.query_db:2.description: I have noticed that I am not consistently receiving notifications about new feature updates for the SecureFlow Suite, which affects my ability to use the software to its full potential.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Delayed Support Response
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am experiencing delays in getting timely responses from TechPulse support during busy periods, which is affecting our project timelines.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: AI Feature Malfunction
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Some of the AI-powered features in CloudLink Designer are intermittently failing to operate, leading to reduced efficiency and user frustration.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Access Issues with Training Module
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am experiencing difficulty accessing the online training modules which are crucial for my team's smooth adoption of the SecureFlow Suite.

var_functions.query_db:8.subject: Update Alerts Absent
var_functions.query_db:8.description: The system does not alert me to the new features added to SecureAnalytics Pro, leading to underutilization of its updates as I'm unaware of them.

var_functions.query_db:8.subject: Scalability Problem
var_functions.query_db:8.description: I am encountering difficulties in scaling TechPulse solutions to meet the increasing demands of our enterprise which is impacting our expansion efforts.

var_functions.query_db:8.subject: SecureAnalytics Compliance Concern
var_functions.query_db:8.description: I need clarification on SecureAnalytics Pro's adherence to security compliance standards.

var_functions.query_db:8.subject: No Feature Update Notices
var_functions.query_db:8.description: I am consistently not getting notified about feature updates for SecureAnalytics Pro, which means I am unable to take advantage of improvements and enhancements.

var_functions.query_db:8.subject: Missing Feature Notifications
var_functions.query_db:8.description: I have not been receiving notifications about new features in SecureAnalytics Pro, causing me to miss out on utilizing the full capabilities of the platform.
